name: Huagong Tech Company Limited
summary: Huagong Tech Company Limited manufactures and sells laser equipment, optical communication devices, laser holographic anti-counterfeiting products, and sensors and information tracing in China and internationally. The company offers proton diagnosis and treatment equipment; and laser smart equipment, such as laser cutting systems, laser welding systems, laser marking products, laser texturing equipment, laser heat treatment systems, laser drilling machines, lasers and various supporting devices, laser processing equipment and plasma cutting equipment, etc. It also provides Laser holographic anti-counterfeiting products, including positioning / non-positioning laser bronzing film, universal version of laser bronzing film, laser anti-counterfeiting packaging materials and integrated encryption anti-counterfeiting mark, holographic two-dimensional code, positioning transfer paper, etc. In addition, the company offers sensor products, such as NTC and PTC series thermistors, and automotive electronics to provide multi-dimensional sensing and control solutions; and optical communication products, such as source optical devices, passive optical devices, intelligent terminals, optical components, etc. Additionally, it provides cloud computing, intelligent manufacturing service platform, license industry anti-counterfeiting, energy industry laser processing, aerospace application, 3C industry laser processing, and automotive industry application solutions. Its products are used in consumer electronics, mechanical manufacturing, communication networks, automobile, aviation, iron and steel metallurgy, shipbuilding and national military defense. Huagong Tech Company Limited was founded in 1999 and is based in Wuhan, China.
